parsed_output.justification: Justin is the most likely Werewolf for several reasons. First, he spoke during the Night phase specifically while the Announcer was calling the Werewolves to wake up. Finally, he proposed a 'vote left' strategy that would result in every player receiving exactly one vote, which according to the rules would mean no one dies, ensuring a win for Team Werewolf.
